articles.title: Warhammer 40,000 Devs Announce And Roll Back Launcher In 24 Hours
articles.description: Owlcat Games quickly retracted its new PC launcher announcement after backlash. The decision sparked nearly 2000 comments without any likes.

articles.title: Meta launches cheaper smart glasses without Ray-Ban
articles.description: Meta introduces $299 smart glasses featuring updated AI and customizable designs. Privacy improvements are also on the way.

articles.title: Here’s how your phone is running after updating to Android 17

articles.title: Exclusive | Rare $18.5M NYC townhouse finds a cash buyer in 3 weeks

articles.title: Minecraft 26.3 Snapshot 1

articles.title: What Owners Say Is The Biggest Problem With Foldable Phones
articles.description: Foldable phone users cite hinge durability and battery life as major concerns. The unique aspect ratio also poses challenges.
